_note: Round-11 follow-up #1: a typed dispatcher declared inside an IIFE-wrapped initializer (`const setup = (() => { const _dispatch = createEventDispatcher<{wrapped:number}>() })()`). Round-10 #2 documented IIFE recursion but `statements_inside_function_expr` only handled bare ArrowFunctionExpression / FunctionExpression — IIFE's CallExpression callee was missed, so the typed dispatcher inside an IIFE went undetected. Native's `synthesized_typed_events` was None, the events surface fell through to the lax untyped path, and consumer-side `<Inner on:wrapped={...}>` accepted any handler. Post-fix native peeks through CallExpression and ParenthesizedExpression wrappers in `statements_inside_function_expr`. Inner here exposes `wrapped: CustomEvent<number>`; Consumer's `takesNumber` handler passes; the swapped `takesString` correctly fires TS2345.
